First Ever Occurrence Date - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_MAT_MEDICAID_EVER Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicaid Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 OUD_MAT_MEDICARE_EVER Use of Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) First Ever Occurrence Date - Medicare Only Claims date - MM/DD/YYYY
 PVD_COMBINED Peripheral Vascular Disease - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met,
